'''mawovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wyakin|wyakin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-w-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wyakin|wyakin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| mawovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæweveth|mæweveth]] || [[word:mæwevej|mæwevej]] || [[word:mæwevesh|mæwevesh]] || [[word:mæweve|mæweve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mawowovoth|mawowovoth]] || [[word:mawowovoj|mawowovoj]] || [[word:mawowovosh|mawowovosh]] || [[word:mawowovo|mawowovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mawovoth|mawovoth]] || [[word:mawovoj|mawovoj]] || [[word:mawovosh|mawovosh]] || [[word:mawovo|mawovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mawofvoth|mawofvoth]] || [[word:mawofvoj|mawofvoj]] || [[word:mawofvosh|mawofvosh]] || [[word:mawofvof|mawofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mawovotho|mawovotho]] || [[word:mawovojo|mawovojo]] || [[word:mawovosho|mawovosho]] || [[word:mawovoko|mawovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mawovoth|mawovoth]] || [[word:mawovoj|mawovoj]] || [[word:mawovosh|mawovosh]] || [[word:mawovo|mawovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mawovothol|mawovothol]] || [[word:mawovojol|mawovojol]] || [[word:mawovoshol|mawovoshol]] || [[word:mawovokol|mawovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mawovothotho|mawovothotho]] || [[word:mawovojojo|mawovojojo]] || [[word:mawovoshosho|mawovoshosho]] || [[word:mawovoko|mawovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mawovothon|mawovothon]] || [[word:mawovojon|mawovojon]] || [[word:mawovoshon|mawovoshon]] || [[word:mawovokon|mawovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mawovothoro|mawovothoro]] || [[word:mawovojoro|mawovojoro]] || [[word:mawovoshoro|mawovoshoro]] || [[word:mawovokoro|mawovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
